name: Clay & Co
bio: Handcrafting functional ceramics and pottery inspired by natural landscapes. Each piece is thrown and glazed in our small backyard studio.

name: Knotted Dreams
bio: Weaving bohemian vibes into modern homes. Specializing in macramé wall hangings, plant hangers, and custom fiber art creations.

name: Color Flow Studio
bio: Creating sustainable wearable art using organic materials and traditional hand-dyeing techniques. Colorful scarves, wraps, and garments.

name: Strings & Things
bio: Luthiers dedicated to crafting fine acoustic instruments. Every guitar and ukulele is built by hand with hand-selected tone woods.

name: Pure Botanicals
bio: All-natural, plant-based skincare crafted in small batches. We use raw honey, organic essential oils, and wild-harvested herbs.

name: Artisan Brush Co
bio: Fine art prints and original paintings bringing the serenity of nature indoors. Specializing in watercolors, gouache, and landscape acrylics.
